name: cards-side
purpose: Use for an explicit pair — two options, two phases, two artifacts presented with equal weight.

cards.description: Exactly two list items, each one card. Lead each with **Card Title.** then body text.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: cards-side -->

## Slide heading.

- **Left card title.** Body text for the left card, two short sentences.
- **Right card title.** Body text for the right card, two short sentences.
